name: gtwmcp
description: MCP Gateway — aggregate multiple MCP servers behind a single stdio interface

scripts.check: node --check bin/gtwmcp.js && node --check src/cli.js && for f in src/commands/*.js src/config/*.js src/keychain/*.js src/mcp/*.js src/oauth/*.js src/serve/*.js test/*.js test/fixtures/*.js; do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done
